name: HHU Ultrasonic Heat Meter
desc: Smart ultrasonic heat/cold energy meter, GB/T32224-2020 & JJG225-2024 compliant, IP65/67/68, RS485/M-Bus/4G/NB-IoT, PT1000 sensor.
overview: The HHU Ultrasonic Heat Energy Meter measures heating and cooling energy in district heating, central air conditioning and building energy management systems. Ultrasonic flow measurement means no moving parts, long service life and minimal maintenance. Class 2 accuracy. Supports M-Bus, RS485, NB-IoT and 4G for remote data collection. IP65–IP68 waterproofing.

specs.label: Flow DN50
specs.value: Q1: 0.6 m³/h; Q2: 15 m³/h; Q4: 30 m³/h

specs.label: Flow DN65
specs.value: Q1: 1 m³/h; Q2: 25 m³/h; Q4: 50 m³/h

specs.label: Flow DN80
specs.value: Q1: 1.6 m³/h; Q2: 40 m³/h; Q4: 80 m³/h

specs.label: Flow DN150
specs.value: Q1: 6 m³/h; Q2: 150 m³/h; Q4: 300 m³/h

features: High-quality imported piezoelectric transducers — stable, consistent ultrasonic signal with no drift over time
PT1000 platinum resistance temperature sensor + precision circuit — highly accurate ΔT measurement (resolution 0.01°C)
Self-diagnostic function: detects communication faults, low power, tampering — displays error codes and auto-saves data before shutdown
Remote data transmission via M-Bus / RS485 / NB-IoT / 4G for centralised billing and energy management
Detachable design: mountable in any of 4 orientations — easy reading, simple on-site operation
Dual heating and cooling energy measurement in the same meter — suitable for district heating and central A/C
IP65 / IP67 / IP68 protection — suitable for damp plant rooms, underground meter pits and outdoor installation
